notes: Shared cast parameters — single source of truth consumed by BOTH sprites.cast_sheets and sprites.cast_portraits (M4). Generators read this file via the manifest's 'cast' path; they must never redefine these values locally, so sheets and portraits stay in agreement. Ramp references are <ramp>[<index>] into artgen/palettes/the_above.json (dark->light). Heights are art px within the 16x24 frame (cat: 16x16). Sources: story/characters.md, story/bible.md Act 1.

hair.style: short, neat, grey-flecked temples (stone[2] pixels at the sides)

outfit.torso: earth[2] wool coat over paper[2] shirt, coat edge earth[1]

hoca.portrait: tired kind eyes, faint stubble shadow (amber[0]), brows straight; moods: neutral / tired (lids heavier, slight slump) / wry (one brow up, mouth corner up) / listening (eyes up and off-frame right, mouth still)

yildiz.coat: tortoiseshell: base void[1], large patches earth[1], small patches amber[0], chest smudge paper[1]
yildiz.portrait: head + chest, unimpressed half-lidded stare, one ear notched

hair.style: covered by paper[2] yemeni headscarf, knotted at the side

fadime.portrait: warm broad face, flour smudge on one cheek (paper[2])

outfit.torso: earth[1] knit vest over amber[1]... use paper[1] shirt instead (skin/shirt contrast), sleeves rolled
rose[0] cardigan over paper[1] shirt, buttoned

sukru.portrait: deep smile lines, glasses? no — bare, sharp pale eyes

elif.build: small, forward-leaning, always about to ask

outfit.accessory: small earth[1] backpack visible from behind (walk_n frames)

elif.portrait: big attentive eyes, mouth slightly open mid-question

hair.style: grey at sides, balding crown, grey moustache (stone[2])

outfit.torso: void[2] vest over paper[2] shirt, sleeves rolled, stone[0] waist apron

kadir.portrait: heavy brows, softest eyes in town, moustache hides the smile

hair.style: under an earth[1] flat cap (kasket), brim earth[0]

outfit.torso: ship[1] work jacket half-zipped over paper[1] shirt

ismet.portrait: cap low, one eye squinted from years of switchback sun, toothpick? no — keep clean

hair.style: grey brush cut, grey stubble (stone[1] jaw pixels)

metin.portrait: calm, jaw set, eyes that have watched racks for decades; he hums when the data is good

hair.style: low ponytail over shoulder, loose strand at temple

outfit.torso: rose[1] oversized sweater, sleeves pushed up, paper[2] collar peeking

hair.style: balding, grey sides, round stone[3] glasses

outfit.torso: stone[1] suit jacket, paper[2] shirt, rose[1] tie

tezcan.portrait: glasses catch the light (stone[3] lens pixels), unreadable administrator calm
